overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a character in dark clothing exploring a snowy, mountainous wilderness at night. The character traverses rocky terrain and snow-covered paths, passing through a wooden gate and approaching distant camp lights in the distance.

dark mountain silhouette visible against the night sky
wooden fence line running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered mountain path at night, approaching a wooden gate. The open landscape reveals distant mountain silhouettes against the starry sky, with sparse vegetation visible along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with boulders

events.description: character begins climbing up and over large rock formations

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky canyon terrain, climbing over boulders and snow patches

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon walls enclosing the path
large boulders with patches of snow
jagged rock outcrops lining the canyon

segments.scene_description: After passing through the gate, the scene shifts to an enclosed rocky canyon. The character climbs over snow-dusted boulders between steep canyon walls, navigating the narrow passage as the terrain becomes more rugged and vertical.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain passage with climbing sections

events.description: game UI interaction prompt briefly appears at bottom center of screen

agents.ego_description: continuing through rocky terrain, navigating around large boulders and uneven ground

entered.detail: flat rock platforms suitable for climbing
fallen dead tree trunk lying across the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character continues traversing the rocky mountain passage, climbing over platforms and navigating around a fallen dead tree. A brief UI interaction prompt appears, indicating a game mechanic, as the terrain remains rugged with scattered snow patches.

events.description: distant campfire lights become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking toward distant lights, moving through grassy terrain with snow patches

entered.detail: warm orange lights from a distant camp or settlement visible in the valley
wooden cross or marker standing in the grass
mixed grass and snow covered ground on the mountainside

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens up to a wide mountain overlook where distant campfire lights become visible in the valley below. The character moves through mixed grass and snow toward the lights, passing a wooden cross marker as the landscape transitions from rocky canyon to open hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, starry mountain path into a restrictive rocky canyon before finally emerging onto a wide hillside overlook. It begins with the character walking along a snow-covered trail toward a wooden gate, with distant mountain silhouettes framing the night sky. As the character passes through the gate, the environment shifts into an enclosed canyon where the camera follows the ascent over snow-dusted boulders and steep, vertical walls. The scene then progresses through a rugged passage of rocky platforms and a fallen dead tree before the terrain opens up once more. Finally, the camera moves across a mix of grass and snow, passing a wooden cross marker as the view expands to reveal glowing campfire lights in the valley below.
